name: Fadogia Agrestis
summary: Fadogia agrestis has no reliable human testosterone trial evidence; available testosterone claims come mainly from animal studies, including animal safety signals, so it should remain avoid/research-only rather than promoted.
description: Fadogia agrestis has no reliable human testosterone trial evidence; available testosterone claims come mainly from animal studies, including animal safety signals, so it should remain avoid/research-only rather than promoted.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: Mechanism/background only; do not publish clinical benefit claims without human evidence.
